title: aphragmus nepalensis
intro: Aphragmus nepalensis, also known as Himalayan balsam, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Aphragmus nepalensis include making tea from its leaves and flowers, as well as using its roots in traditional remedies.
